# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins: ["http://example.com", "https://example.com"]
      methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
      headers: ["Content-Type", "Authorization"]

services:
  - name: my-service
    id: 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config: {}
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          requests_per_minute: 100

routes:
  - name: my-route
    paths:
      - /my-path
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["http://example.com", "https://example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
          headers: ["Content-Type", "Authorization"]
